content: let me know what you'll think

author: .paulharris
content:
At this point i cant really populate downscore or disconnect with anything in that list so i think we'll just not be able to return them in the short term...
I think the desire is good though, I think the validation requirement is the main concern <@586161934425128960> has with the enumerations. 
We'd be treating it more like an example admittedly in teku, if we do implement reasons, but at the moment we have a large or small downscore, and thats evident from the values so its not meaningful.
